query:
SELECT u.name, u.email, uesl.digest_type, uesl.status, uesl.sent_date, uesl.week_key, uesl.item_count, uesl.dry_run
FROM userEmailSendLog uesl
JOIN users u ON u.id = uesl.user_id
WHERE uesl.digest_type = 'thursday'
ORDER BY uesl.sent_at DESC
LIMIT 20;
